name: rms
description: Codex adapter for Reliable Modular Systems skills and workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build software through explicit module contracts.
interface.longDescription: RMS gives Codex bounded workflows for inspecting modules, implementing changes, pruning semantic residue, evolving contracts, composing modules, and verifying conformance against canonical manifests.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this RMS module before changing it.
Implement this change within the owning module.
Prune semantic residue from this module without changing public behavior.
Verify this module against its RMS contracts.
